cards.summary: Insufficient data to select TB screening algorithm
cards.detail: WHO SMART DAK TB decision TB.B4.DT requires both age and risk group. Age was available from Patient.birthDate, but no mapped TB risk group was available. No DAK screening recommendation was generated.

source.label: WHO SMART DAK TB v1.0.2-ci-build, TB.B4.DT Screening algorithm

extension.modelGrounding: This card intentionally stops before rule execution because deterministic middleware reported missing data.
